all.en: Company-wide Announcement from Human Resources Department
all.zh: 人力資源部全公司公告

all.en: Subject: Annual Group Business Travel Insurance Renewal — Action Required
all.zh: 主旨：年度團體商務差旅保險續保 — 需採取行動

all.en: Effective May 1, our group travel insurance provider will change.
all.zh: 自 5 月 1 日起，本公司團體差旅保險之承保公司將異動。

all.en: After a competitive review, we have selected SafeJourney Global Insurance.
all.zh: 經比價評估後，本公司選定 SafeJourney 環球保險。

all.en: The previous provider, AsiaShield, will continue cover until April 30.
all.zh: 前承保公司亞盾保險之保障將延續至 4 月 30 日為止。

all.en: SafeJourney offers enhanced coverage at a 12 percent lower premium.
all.zh: SafeJourney 提供更佳保障，保費低於前者 12%。

all.en: Coverage limits have increased significantly across most categories.
all.zh: 多數項目之保額皆顯著提高。

all.en: Medical emergency limit rose from USD 250,000 to USD 500,000.
all.zh: 醫療緊急救援上限自 25 萬美元提升至 50 萬美元。

all.en: Trip cancellation now covers up to USD 15,000 per insured employee.
all.zh: 行程取消每位被保險員工最高賠付 15,000 美元。

all.en: Lost baggage compensation is doubled to USD 4,000 per incident.
all.zh: 行李遺失賠償加倍為每案 4,000 美元。

all.en: Emergency medical evacuation is now included without additional cost.
all.zh: 緊急醫療後送已納入保障，不另收費。

all.en: Mental health support and 24-hour multilingual hotline are included.
all.zh: 心理健康支援與 24 小時多語熱線皆含括其中。

all.en: Coverage applies automatically to all international business trips.
all.zh: 保障自動適用於所有國際差旅。

all.en: Domestic trips exceeding 200 kilometers are also covered.
all.zh: 國內差旅超過 200 公里者亦受保障。

all.en: All employees must confirm enrollment by April 22 at 17:00.
all.zh: 所有員工須於 4 月 22 日 17:00 前完成投保確認。

all.en: Failure to confirm will be treated as opting out of coverage.
all.zh: 未確認者視同放棄投保。

all.en: To confirm, please complete the online form at the HR portal.
all.zh: 請於人資入口網站填寫線上表單以完成確認。

all.en: The form requires three minutes and asks for emergency contacts.
all.zh: 表單填寫約需三分鐘，須填寫緊急聯絡人資料。

all.en: Beneficiary designation must also be updated for accidental death benefit.
all.zh: 意外身故給付之受益人指定亦須更新。

all.en: Existing beneficiary records will not transfer to the new provider.
all.zh: 原承保公司之受益人資料不會移轉至新公司。

all.en: This is a critical step often overlooked during transitions.
all.zh: 此為轉換期常被忽略之關鍵步驟。

all.en: Reply from Marcus Liu, Sales Engineer in Bangkok office:
all.zh: 曼谷辦事處業務工程師 Marcus Liu 回覆：

all.en: Hi HR team, I have a few questions about the new insurance.
all.zh: 人資團隊您好，關於新保險我有幾項問題。

all.en: I travel to Vietnam and Indonesia approximately twice each month.
all.zh: 我每月約往返越南與印尼兩次。

all.en: Does the policy automatically activate each time, or must I register trips?
all.zh: 請問保單會自動生效，或每次須登記行程？

all.en: My current AsiaShield app requires trip notification before departure.
all.zh: 我目前使用之亞盾 App 須於出發前通報行程。

all.en: I would also like to know if my spouse can join under an accompanying clause.
all.zh: 另想了解配偶能否依眷屬條款一同投保。

all.en: She occasionally travels with me on regional client visits.
all.zh: 她偶爾會陪同我進行區域客戶拜訪。

all.en: HR reply to Marcus: Excellent questions, Marcus.
all.zh: 人資回覆 Marcus：Marcus 您好，問題極佳。

all.en: Trip registration is automatic via the corporate booking platform.
all.zh: 行程登記透過企業訂票平台自動完成。

all.en: Any flight booked through Concur triggers immediate coverage activation.
all.zh: 凡透過 Concur 訂購之航班皆自動啟動保障。

all.en: Bookings made outside the platform must be manually reported within 24 hours.
all.zh: 未透過平台之訂購須於 24 小時內手動申報。

all.en: Spousal coverage is available as an optional add-on at low cost.
all.zh: 配偶保障屬可選加保項目，費用低廉。

all.en: The premium is USD 18 per trip when accompanying an insured employee.
all.zh: 陪同被保險員工出差時，每趟保費為 18 美元。

all.en: She must be added to the trip itinerary at the time of booking.
all.zh: 須於訂購時將其加入行程資料。

all.en: Documentation will be required to verify the relationship.
all.zh: 須提供文件以驗證親屬關係。

all.en: Marriage certificate or household registration is acceptable.
all.zh: 結婚證書或戶籍謄本皆可接受。

all.en: Further question from Priya Singh, Regional Counsel in Singapore:
all.zh: 新加坡區域法務 Priya Singh 進一步詢問：

all.en: What about pre-existing medical conditions disclosed previously?
all.zh: 過去已申報之既有病史處置如何？

all.en: Will those disclosures carry over to SafeJourney automatically?
all.zh: 該等申報是否會自動延續至 SafeJourney？

all.en: I would prefer not to re-submit sensitive medical information.
all.zh: 本人希望不必重複提交敏感醫療資料。

all.en: HR response: Existing disclosures have been transferred under data protection agreement.
all.zh: 人資回覆：原申報資料已依資料保護協議完成移轉。

all.en: SafeJourney has signed a data sharing arrangement with AsiaShield.
all.zh: SafeJourney 已與亞盾保險簽署資料分享協議。

all.en: All transfers are encrypted and limited to underwriting use only.
all.zh: 所有移轉皆加密並限於核保用途。

all.en: You may review or update your file via the secure HR self-service portal.
all.zh: 您可透過人資安全自助平台查閱或更新個人檔案。

all.en: Information is retained for the duration of employment plus seven years.
all.zh: 資料保留期間為任職期間加七年。

all.en: Final reminder issued one week before deadline:
all.zh: 截止前一週發出之最終提醒：

all.en: As of today, 78 percent of employees have confirmed enrollment.
all.zh: 截至今日，已有 78% 員工完成投保確認。

all.en: Please assist your direct reports who have not yet completed the form.
all.zh: 請協助部屬中尚未完成表單之同仁。

all.en: Managers can monitor team status via the dashboard link below.
all.zh: 主管可透過下方儀表板連結查看團隊狀態。

all.en: Personal travel is not covered and requires separate insurance.
all.zh: 私人旅遊不在保障範圍內，須另行投保。

all.en: Detailed policy document is available in English, Chinese, and Thai.
all.zh: 詳細保單條款備有英文、中文與泰文三種版本。

all.en: Q&A sessions will be held via Teams on April 17 and 19.
all.zh: 說明會將於 4 月 17 日及 19 日透過 Teams 舉辦。

all.en: Recordings will be uploaded to the HR resources page afterward.
all.zh: 錄影檔將於會後上傳至人資資源網頁。

all.en: Annual enrollment cycle closes officially on April 22 at 17:00 sharp.
all.zh: 年度投保確認期間於 4 月 22 日 17:00 整正式結束。
